steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0009_hierarchical_annotation_v2 is completed and its dataset asset is intact.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Initialize the mandatory task folder structure (no expected_assets declared).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: no literature evidence is required for this label-correction task.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no external information is required for this correction.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Inspect the t0009 dataset asset, the t0003 download decisions, t0005 v1 annotation labels, and the dataset aggregator's correction-overlay code paths.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan the correction file structure, replacement-asset layout, file_changes overlay paths, and aggregator verification commands.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Author the relabeled JSONL, the relabeled description.md, and the corrections/dataset_hierarchical-annotation-v2.json file; verify the aggregator overlay applies.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical correction with no design degrees of freedom.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md (before/after label distribution) and results_detailed.md (rationale and follow-up suggestion); write metrics.json/costs.json/remote_machines_used.json.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: no quantitative results to compare against literature.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate follow-up suggestions, including S-0009-06 variant a (replace proxy rows with native WorkArena++/tau-bench data).

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, mark task.json status completed, and prepare for PR.
